ACKNOWLEDGMENT DRAFT — internal review only

Donor: Priya Raghunathan
Address: 88 Beacon Street, Boston
Email: priya.r@fastmail.com
Gift date: January 5, 2026

Draft:

Dear Priya,

On behalf of everyone at the Harbor Light Shelter, thank you. Your
year-end gift arrived on January 5, 2026, and will keep our doors open
through the coldest months. Our board chair, Thomas Nguyen, asked me to
pass along his personal thanks as well.

You can reach me anytime at (617) 555-0144.

Warmly,

Rebecca Ortiz
Harbor Light Shelter, Boston
